text: In the first scene, I feel an odd sense of separation as I peer through the glass into a group deep in conversation or learning. There is a calm focus inside, but I remain on the periphery, observing rather than participating. In the second scene, the bold R+D display energizes me. The colors and intention behind the display fill me with curiosity and excitement—this space is about discovery, possibility, and the playful seriousness of creation. I feel drawn to interact, to ask questions, to ponder what new realities might emerge from this union of research and imagination.
